title: GTA Online
headline: GTA Online
subtitle: Claim Two Robbery Target Vehicles
content:
Turn an obsession for collectible cars into a compulsion for robbery this week. Successfully complete The Podium Robbery for the opportunity to claim the Pfister Comet S2 Cabrio (Sports) with limited-time LS Pounders vanity plate and execute The Gangbanger Robbery for the chance to own the Lampadati Tigon (Super) with limited-time LS Panic vanity plate.

Satisfy the Weekly Challenge by completing any two Salvage Yard Robberies this week to get GTA$100,000.
